name: Spaghetti with Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the basil leaves, removing the stems.
2. Place the basil in a blender with the garlic, olive oil, pine nuts, butter, and Parmesan cheese. Puree until smooth.
3. Cook the spaghetti al dente in boiling salted water.
4. Drain the pasta thoroughly.
5. Toss the cooked spaghetti immediately with the pesto sauce.
6. Serve with additional grated Parmesan cheese on top.
